cta.title: Looking for a Reliable Gloves Supplier?

about.title: About Muzhou
about.subtitle: Over 30 years of heritage, dedicated to crafting the perfect gloves
about.intro: Muzhou Gloves Co., Ltd. has been deeply engaged in the gloves industry for over 30 years, focusing on R&D and production with craftsmanship. Our annual output exceeds one million pairs, specializing in handmade leather gloves, fabric gloves, lace gloves, sports gloves, sun protection gloves, casual fashion gloves, and other full-category gloves products.
about.intro2: We consistently maintain strict quality control, persist in innovative R&D of new styles, and focus on providing stable, high-quality products with reliable and thoughtful service. Upholding our integrity-based business philosophy, we work together with domestic and international clients for mutual benefit and shared growth.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.item1_desc: Rooted in the homeland of gloves, preserving handcrafting traditions
timeline.item2_desc: Established at Yiwu International Trade Mart, expanding globally
timeline.item3_desc: Built in-house factory, achieving full-chain quality control
timeline.item4_desc: Annual output of 1M+ pairs, exported to 30+ countries worldwide

about.cert_desc: Every pair of gloves undergoes rigorous quality inspection before shipping, ensuring materials, craftsmanship, and comfort meet our standards. We support custom sample orders, logo customization, and packaging customization.

ski.name: Ski Gloves
ski.desc: Waterproof, windproof, touchscreen-compatible ski gloves. Customizable for men, women, and children in five-finger and mitten styles. Made with high-performance waterproof fabrics and thick warm lining.

leather.name: Leather Gloves
leather.desc: Premium sheepskin, deerskin, and calfskin leather gloves and mittens for men and women. Meticulously handcrafted with fine leather that is soft, breathable, and warm.

fabric.name: Fabric Gloves
fabric.desc: Gloves made from Develon, rabbit fur, deerskin velvet, cashmere and other composite short-pile fabrics for men and women. Soft, comfortable, excellent warmth retention, fashionable and versatile.

splice.name: Fashion Splice Gloves
splice.desc: Gloves made with different materials on the palm and back, following current fabric trends. AB-version splice design combining fashion and practicality.

mittens.name: Mittens
mittens.desc: Mittens made from various fabrics for men, women, and children. Using imitation otter fur, new-material arctic velvet and other premium linings for superior warmth.

animals.name: Animal-Shaped Gloves
animals.desc: Fabric gloves crafted into various animal shapes, combining fun and warmth. Perfect for parent-child activities and holiday gifts.

fingerless.name: Fingerless Gloves
fingerless.desc: Fashionable fingerless gloves made from various fabrics. Stylish and versatile, providing warmth while keeping fingers free.

lace.name: Lace & Decorative Gloves
lace.desc: Decorative sun-protection gloves made from various lace fabrics. Elegant and refined, combining decorative beauty with sun protection for spring and summer.

sports.name: Sports & Functional Gloves
sports.desc: Sports, cycling and functional gloves. Made with high-elasticity breathable fabrics, anti-slip and wear-resistant, providing professional hand protection for sports enthusiasts.
